summary: Maintain web applications, run digital campaigns, and was selected by faculty to appear in a college-wide promotional video — representing the department to the broader UTA community.

Led a 7-engineer team modernizing Alight Solutions' cloud platform. Delivered reusable Terraform module library, blue-green deployment pipelines, and hardened AWS security posture with CloudWatch, IAM, and VPC controls.

Delivered multi-cloud migrations and modernization for H&M, Siemens, Nokia, and Südzucker. Migrated 100+ servers to Azure for H&M. Built Terraform landing zones, GitHub Actions pipelines, EKS deployments, and secure network patterns.

Built one-click migration automation with Terraform & REST APIs. Developed a PHP cloud-practice showcase portal. Implemented security controls (SonarQube, TLS 1.2, private endpoints) and automated Azure DevOps workflows.
Developed Android applications using MVVM architecture, focusing on maintainable UI components and modular code design.
